hero.headline:
Your Backyard Vision, Brought
to Life
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should feel like a retreat, not a project. For over 28 years, our licensed landscape architects have designed and built Houston's finest pools, outdoor kitchens, and landscapes -- managing every detail from concept to completion so you can simply enjoy the result.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block">Design & Construction
services.subtitle: From custom pools to full landscape transformations, our licensed architects and skilled craftsmen handle every phase of your project with precision and artistry.

cards.title: Custom Pool & Spa Design
cards.description: Swimming pools and hot tubs designed by licensed landscape architects and seamlessly integrated into your overall outdoor living plan.

cards.title: Landscape Architecture
cards.description: Comprehensive landscape design led by registered professionals who create custom plans tailored to your vision, property, and Houston's unique climate.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Custom outdoor kitchen spaces and living areas designed for entertaining, from built-in grills and bars to full pavilion setups.

cards.title: Water Features & Lighting
cards.description: Fountains, ponds, and decorative water elements paired with professional landscape lighting to extend your outdoor enjoyment into the evening.

cards.title: Hardscape & Construction
cards.description: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, pergolas, custom iron work, and fencing -- all built by our experienced craftsmen to the highest standards.

cards.title: Maintenance & Seasonal Color
cards.description: Certified maintenance teams and seasonal planting programs that keep your landscape vibrant and your investment protected year-round.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Reality in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Meet with our licensed landscape architects for a complimentary consultation. We listen to your ideas, assess your property, and discuss possibilities for your outdoor space.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our team creates a custom plan, manages every contractor, and oversees construction from groundbreaking to final planting. One firm, one point of contact, zero stress.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Retreat
steps.description: Step into the backyard you always imagined. And with our ongoing maintenance services, it stays beautiful for years to come.

about.label: Why Houston Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: Licensed Architects, Not Just Contractors
about.description: Founded in 1998, Prewett, Read & Associates is led by registered, licensed landscape architects who bring the same personalized attention to every project. Our team of designers, project managers, and skilled craftsmen manages every detail of the design-build process -- so your outdoor space is not just built, but thoughtfully designed from the ground up.

features.title: Registered Landscape Architects
features.description: Led by licensed professionals, not just contractors. Our principals are directly involved in every project from concept to completion.

features.title: Full Design-Build Service
features.description: One firm handles design, construction, irrigation, lighting, and maintenance. No juggling multiple contractors or conflicting timelines.

features.title: 28 Years of Houston Expertise
features.description: Since 1998, we have built a reputation for quality and reliability. Our long-term client relationships speak to the trust we have earned.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed proposals so you know exactly what to expect -- no hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Promise
guarantee.description: Every project we deliver is backed by our commitment to quality craftsmanship and client satisfaction. If any element of our work does not meet the standards we set together, we will make it right. That is the promise we have kept since 1998.

faqs.question: How does the design-build process work?
faqs.answer: It starts with a complimentary consultation where we discuss your vision and assess your property. From there, our architects create a detailed design plan. Once approved, our construction team handles every phase -- permits, grading, plumbing, hardscape, planting -- with a single project manager as your point of contact throughout.

faqs.question: Do I need a landscape architect for my project?
faqs.answer: For projects involving pools, significant grading, drainage, or multiple outdoor elements, a licensed landscape architect ensures everything works together structurally and aesthetically. Our designs account for drainage, irrigation, and long-term plant health -- details that save you costly fixes down the road.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A pool and landscape project typically runs 8-16 weeks from design approval to completion. We provide a detailed timeline during the proposal phase so you know what to expect at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We manage all permits, inspections, and regulatory requirements. Our TCEQ-licensed irrigation team and certified professionals ensure everything meets or exceeds local codes.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after the project is complete?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our certified maintenance team provides ongoing landscape care, seasonal color programs, and irrigation management. Many of our clients have been with us for over a decade because we protect the investment we helped them build.

testimonials.name: Jack & Karen L.
testimonials.text: We have worked with Bill and the Prewett, Read team on multiple projects that have met all our needs and desires. Their attention to detail and professionalism is unmatched.

testimonials.name: Myra P.
testimonials.text: Bill Prewett is a customer's dream contractor. If anything came up, small or large, he took care of it quickly. The pool, landscaping, and hardscaping all turned out beautifully.

testimonials.name: Sandy & John N.
testimonials.text: All of the contractors he lined up and anyone we came in contact with over the course of the project were great. Our backyard is now the retreat we always wanted.
